title: senecio × futakii
intro: Senecio × futakii, also known as the 'Golden Chrysanthemum' or 'Futakii Senecio', is a sterile hybrid plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to Japan. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, sore throats, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Senecio × futakii include its ability to reduce inflammation, boost the immune system, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Senecio × futakii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, flu, and other respiratory issues.
